dict.string: Flavia uses the camera so you can attach photos to study entries.
Flavia reads heart rate, HRV, resting heart rate, respiratory rate, blood oxygen, body temperature, sleep, steps, and active energy from Apple Health — including data synced from Whoop or Oura.
Flavia reads heart rate, HRV, resting heart rate, respiratory rate, blood oxygen, body temperature, sleep, steps, and active energy from Apple Health — including data synced from Whoop or Oura.
Flavia uses your approximate location to look up the local UV index, air quality, and pollen levels and save them with your study data.
Flavia uses your approximate location to look up the local UV index, air quality, and pollen levels and save them with your study data.
Flavia uses the microphone so you can record voice notes as part of the study.

This message should never appear. Please adjust this when you start using motion information. We have to put this in here as ResearchKit has the possibility to use it and not putting it here returns an error on AppStore Connect.
Flavia uses speech recognition so you can dictate meal entries instead of typing them.
